home.heroSubtitle: CoolArena is Riyadh's home for ice skating, hockey, and figure skating — for every age, every skill level.
home.feature1Desc: A full-size, professionally maintained rink open year-round in Riyadh's climate.
home.feature2Desc: From first glides to competitive figure skating and hockey coaching.
home.feature3Desc: Skate more, pay less with flexible monthly membership plans.
home.locationText: CoolArena Ice Rink, King Fahd Road, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
home.pricingText: 80 SAR per adult · 60 SAR per child
home.kidsText: Kids welcome daily 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM (except Wednesdays)

about.title: About CoolArena
about.body1: CoolArena opened its doors in Riyadh to bring world-class ice skating to Saudi Arabia. Our full-size rink hosts public skating sessions, competitive hockey, figure skating training, and private events all year round.
about.body2: Our certified coaches and rink staff are dedicated to making the ice welcoming for beginners while pushing advanced skaters and athletes to reach their goals.
about.value2: A welcoming rink for every age and skill level
about.value3: Community — leagues, lessons, and events for Riyadh

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay per session, or save with a monthly membership.
pricing.kidsNote: Kids welcome daily 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM (except Wednesdays).
pricing.womenOnlyNote: Wednesdays are reserved for women, all day.

contact.title: Contact & Location
contact.address: King Fahd Road, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
contact.hours: 5:00 PM – 1:00 AM daily · Closed Mondays · Wednesdays: Women Only
contact.mapNote: Located on King Fahd Road, easily reachable from central Riyadh.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Browse and book upcoming ice sessions.

booking.title: Book Session
booking.kidsNote: Children welcome 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM only (not on Wednesdays).
booking.womenOnlyNote: This session is reserved for women.
booking.mockNotice: Demo checkout — no real payment will be charged.
booking.successBody: Your spot is reserved. See you on the ice.
booking.loginRequired: Please log in to book a session.
